IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: AS LEADERS IN AFFORDABLE HOUSING, WE ARE DEDICATED TO QUALITY, RESPECT ANDINTEGRITY. OUR DESIRE IS TO PROVIDE SUPPORT AND RESOURCES TO CREATE AN ENVIRONMENT THAT WILL ENRICH THE LIVES OF OUR EMPLOYEES AND RESIDENTS. WE TAKE PRIDE IN BUILDING, ADMINISTERING, AND MAINTAINING HIGH STANDARDS OF SERVICE FOR INDIVIDUALS AND FAMILIES. WITH CONTINUED EDUCATION, COMMUNITY INVOLVEMENT, AND REFINED PRACTICES, WE WILL DEVELOP AND MAINTAIN SUPERIOR AFFORDABLE HOUSING THAT SURPASSES EXPECTATIONS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: AS LEADERS IN AFFORDABLE HOUSING, WE ARE DEDICATED TO QUALITY, RESPECT AND INTEGRITY. OUR DESIRE IS TO PROVIDE SUPPORT AND RESOURCES TO CREATE AN ENVIRONMENT THAT WILL ENRICH THE LIVES OF OUR EMPLOYEES AND RESIDENTS. WE TAKE PRIDE IN BUILDING, ADMINISTERING, AND MAINTAINING HIGH STANDARDS OF SERVICE FOR INDIVIDUALS AND FAMILIES. WITH CONTINUED EDUCATION, COMMUNITY INVOLVEMENT, AND REFINED PRACTICES, WE WILL DEVELOP AND MAINTAIN SUPERIOR AFFORDABLE HOUSING THAT SURPASSES EXPECTATIONS.
IRS990.Desc: THE VALLEY VIEW RETIREMENT CENTER OPERATES APARTMENT UNITS FOR LOW-INCOME ELDERLY TENANTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CORPORATION ADOPTED THE STANDARD FOR ACCOUNTING FOR UNCERTAINTY IN INCOME TAXES, THE CORPORATION RECOGNIZES A TAX BENEFIT ONLY IF IT IS MORE LIKELY THAN NOT THE TAX POSITION WOULD BE SUSTAINED IN A TAX EXAMINATION, WITH A TAX EXAMINATION BEING PRESUMED TO OCCUR. THE AMOUNT RECOGNIZED IS THE LARGEST AMOUNT OF TAX BENEFIT THAT IS GREATER THAN 50% LIKELY OF BEING REALIZED ON EXAMINATION. FOR TAX POSITIONS NOT MEETING THE MORE-LIKELY-THAN-NOT TEST, NO TAX BENEFIT IS RECORDED. FEDERAL AND STATE TAX AUTHORITIES (IF APPLICABLE) GENERALLY HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXAMINE AND AUDIT THE PREVIOUS THREE YEARS OF TAX RETURNS FILED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 3
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION DELEGATES MANAGEMENT TO PACIFIC RETIREMENT SERVICES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SPONSORING ORGANIZATION, PACIFIC RETIREMENT SERVICES, INC., IS THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SPONSORING ORGANIZATION, PACIFIC RETIREMENT SERVICES, APPOINTS BOARD MEMBERS TO THE BOARD.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ARTICLES OF INCORPORATION MAY NOT BE AMENDED WITHOUT THE PRIOR WRITTEN APPROVAL OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 IS REVIEWED BY MANAGEMENT AND PROVIDED TO THE BOARD BEFORE FILING WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND QUESTIONNAIRE ARE SENT TO ALL BOARD MEMBERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES ANNUALLY. THERE ARE TWO POLICIES RELATED TO CONFLICTS OF INTEREST: 1.BOARD OF DIRECTORS; 2. KEY EMPLOYEES, WHICH IDENTIFY THE PURPOSE, DEFINITIONS, AND PROCEDURES. IF A CONFLICT IS SELF-IDENTIFIED BY A BOARD MEMBER OR KEY EMPLOYEE IN THE QUESTIONNAIRE AND/OR MEETING, PROCEDURES ARE FOLLOWED AND DOCUMENTED ACCORDING TO THE POLICY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COMPENSATION COMMITTEE OF THE PRS BOARD EXISTS TO DETERMINE COMPENSATION FOR THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF EACH COMMUNITY. THIS COMMITTEE IS COMPRISED OF THE OFFICERS OF THE PRS BOARD OF DIRECTORS. THE COMMITTEE HAS A CHARTER THAT OUTLINES ITS DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES. IT ALSO HAS AGENDA ELEMENTS THAT DESCRIBE THE ACTIVITIES THAT THE COMMITTEE UNDERTAKES DURING THE YEAR. THE VICE PRESIDENT OF HUMAN RESOURCES PROVIDED SALARY STUDIES FROM THE FOLLOWING RESOURCES TO THE COMMITTEE RELATIVE TO EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR COMPENSATION: SALARY.COM, PAYSCALE.COM, 990 REVIEW (LIKE SIZE ORGANIZATIONS), CEMO (CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICERS OF MULTI-FACILITY ORGANIZATIONS) SALARY STUDY RESULTS, AND INDUSTRY STATE ASSOCIATION SALARY STUDY RESULTS BASED ON GEOGRAPHICAL LOCATION. THE RECOMMENDATION FOR BASE COMPENSATION AND BONUS ARE PROVIDED BY THE IMMEDIATE SUPERVISOR, BASED ON STUDY FINDING AND PERFORMANCE FACTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL REQUESTS GO THROUGH THE CORPORATE COUNSEL.

DisregardedEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: RVM FORT WORTH II HOUSING CORPORATION
RVM GRANTS PASS II HOUSING CORPORATION
RVM MYRTLE CREEK II HOUSING CORPORATION
UNIV RTRMNT COMM AT DAVIS FOUNDATION

RVM GRANTS PASS II HOUSING CORPORATION
RVM MYRTLE CREEK II HOUSING CORPORATION
UNIV RTRMNT CMMNITY AT DAVIS FOUNDATION
